artifact: Joins cards to legalities for mythic cards banned in gladiator.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM cards c JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic' AND l.status = 'Banned' AND l.format = 'gladiator';

raw_response.sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM cards c JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic' AND l.status = 'Banned' AND l.format = 'gladiator';
raw_response.artifact: Joins cards to legalities for mythic cards banned in gladiator.

token_notes: Codex sub-agent token usage is visible to the Codex product, not to this local Node runner.
